title: Roster
resetDemoConfirm: Reset the demo to its initial state? Changes from this session (weights, logs, tour) will be erased.
emptyTitle: You don’t have any athletes yet
emptyBody: Generate your invite code and share it so your first athlete links to your roster.
leadThanksBody: We’ll reach out to add your team. It’s saved.
leadIntro: Leave your contact and we’ll write to you. Stays in your team, no spam.
invErrCoachSession: You need to sign in as a coach to see your invitations.
invErrEmailVerify: Verify your email before confirming athletes. We sent a link when you signed up — you can resend it from Roster.
invErrCopy: Couldn’t copy automatically — copy it by hand.
invShare: Share it with your athlete so they can link up.
subTitle: Subscription
subIntro: Athletes are free. The coach needs an active plan to edit programs. Final prices · tax included.
subLoadError: Couldn’t load the subscription info. Try again.
subSemiDetail: {price} every 6 months · {months, plural, one {# month free} other {# months free}}
subManualNote: Semiannual payment arranged by DM (PayPal or bank transfer)
subCoaches: {count, plural, one {1 coach} other {Up to # coaches}}
subChangePlan: To change plans, write to us:
subManualBody: This plan’s semiannual exceeds the Mercado Pago limit. We’ll arrange payment via PayPal or bank transfer.
bannerTitle: {count, plural, one {# athlete without a 1RM} other {# athletes without a 1RM}}
bannerBody: Without a 1RM you can’t prescribe. Assign them a macro to load their 1RMs and start the plan.
tourTitle: In 5 steps you show the heart of the product
tourStep1: Look at the roster and who’s at risk — the guide above says why to look at each one.
tourStep2: Tap an athlete to open their detail.
tourStep3: Look at their year of data: load, recovery, IMR vs phase.
tourStep4: Change a weight or the plan, as a coach.
tourStep5: Tap «Athlete» in the detail and see how they receive it, plates and all.
salesStripTitle: Demo guide · why to look at each one
